knowledge_base.question: What is web development?
knowledge_base.answer: Website creation using frontend and backend technologies to build functional web applications.

knowledge_base.question: How long does a website take to build?
knowledge_base.answer: 3–6 weeks depending on features, design, and complexity.

knowledge_base.question: What technologies do you use?
knowledge_base.answer: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, WordPress, Shopify, Next.js, and AWS.

knowledge_base.question: What is responsive design?
knowledge_base.answer: Websites that adapt to mobile, tablet, and desktop screens.

knowledge_base.question: Do you build custom websites?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, fully custom websites based on business requirements.

knowledge_base.question: I want a website for my business. Can you help?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we build professional websites based on your business type and requirements.

knowledge_base.question: Do you provide domain and hosting?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we assist with domain and hosting setup or manage it for you.

knowledge_base.question: Will my website work on mobile?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, all websites are fully responsive for mobile, tablet, and desktop.

knowledge_base.question: Do you build mobile apps?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we develop Android and iOS mobile applications.

knowledge_base.question: Will my website be secure?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes. We implement security best practices including HTTPS, secure coding, and data protection measures.

knowledge_base.question: Can you upgrade my old outdated website?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes. We redesign and modernize existing websites with improved UI, performance, and functionality.

knowledge_base.question: Do you provide hosting setup and deployment?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes. We handle complete deployment including hosting setup, domain configuration, and live launch.

knowledge_base.question: Can you connect my website with social media?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes. We integrate platforms like Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp into your website.

knowledge_base.question: Can I get updates during development?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes. We provide regular progress updates throughout the development process.

knowledge_base.question: Do you support multiple languages on websites?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we create multilingual websites to help businesses target global audiences.

knowledge_base.question: Do you provide testing before launch?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we perform full testing including speed, responsiveness, and bug fixing before launch.

knowledge_base.question: Can you build real estate websites?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we build real estate platforms with property listings, filters, and inquiry systems.

knowledge_base.question: Do you provide cloud deployment services?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we deploy websites on AWS, Vercel, and other cloud platforms depending on project needs.

knowledge_base.question: Do you help with domain purchase?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we guide you in selecting and purchasing the best domain for your business.

knowledge_base.question: Can you build educational websites?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we build education platforms including schools, academies, and online learning systems.

knowledge_base.question: Can you build directory websites?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we build business directories, listing platforms, and searchable systems.

knowledge_base.question: What is WordPress development?
knowledge_base.answer: CMS-based website development using themes, plugins, and customization.

knowledge_base.question: Can you customize WordPress themes?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, full theme customization and plugin integration.

knowledge_base.question: Is WordPress SEO friendly?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, with proper optimization and plugins.

knowledge_base.question: Can you speed up WordPress websites?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, caching, optimization, and performance tuning.

knowledge_base.question: Will I be able to manage my website myself?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we build user-friendly admin systems so you can manage content easily.

knowledge_base.question: Can I update my website myself?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, you can easily update content using admin dashboards.

knowledge_base.question: Do you build blogs or news websites?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we create blogs, news portals, and content management systems with easy publishing features.

knowledge_base.question: Can I update my website content anytime?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we build easy-to-manage systems so you can update content anytime without coding.

knowledge_base.question: What is Shopify development?
knowledge_base.answer: E-commerce store development using Shopify platform.

knowledge_base.question: Can you customize Shopify themes?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, Liquid coding and theme customization.

knowledge_base.question: Do you integrate payment gateways?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, Stripe, PayPal, JazzCash, EasyPaisa and local gateways.

knowledge_base.question: Do you build WooCommerce stores?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, complete eCommerce store setup and optimization.

knowledge_base.question: Do you offer eCommerce solutions?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we build eCommerce stores with payment integration, product management, and order tracking.

knowledge_base.question: Do you provide eCommerce websites?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we build full online stores with secure payment integration.

knowledge_base.question: Can you build multi-vendor marketplace websites?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we develop marketplace platforms where multiple sellers can register and sell products.

knowledge_base.question: Do you work with international payment systems?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we integrate global payment systems like Stripe, PayPal, and others depending on your region.

knowledge_base.question: What is SEO?
knowledge_base.answer: Process of improving website ranking on Google.

knowledge_base.question: What is on-page SEO?
knowledge_base.answer: Optimization of content, titles, and keywords.

knowledge_base.question: What is technical SEO?
knowledge_base.answer: Website speed, indexing, and crawl optimization.

knowledge_base.question: Do you provide SEO services?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, complete SEO audit, optimization, and ranking strategy.

knowledge_base.question: Is my website SEO friendly?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we build SEO-optimized websites for better ranking on Google.

knowledge_base.question: Can you improve my website speed?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes. We optimize performance using caching, clean code structure, and modern optimization techniques.

knowledge_base.question: Can you optimize my website for Google ranking?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we implement SEO structure, performance optimization, and best practices to improve search visibility.

knowledge_base.question: Do you provide performance optimization services?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we optimize websites for speed, responsiveness, and better user experience.

knowledge_base.question: Can you make my website fast on Google PageSpeed?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we optimize performance to improve loading speed and PageSpeed scores.

knowledge_base.question: What is AI automation?
knowledge_base.answer: Automated workflows using AI tools and APIs.

knowledge_base.question: Can AI improve business?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, improves efficiency, leads, and customer support.

knowledge_base.question: Do you integrate AI into websites?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, chatbots, automation tools, and AI APIs.

knowledge_base.question: What is DevCodex's AI capability?
knowledge_base.answer: We provide the technical backbone for the next generation of enterprise, from deep AI research to production-ready software.

knowledge_base.question: What kind of AI automation features do you offer?
knowledge_base.answer: We offer Autonomous AI Agents (built on GPT-4o, Gemini etc.), Process Orchestration, Predictive Analytics, and Secure RAG Systems.

knowledge_base.question: Are your AI systems secure?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we build Secure RAG Systems that allow you to query internal knowledge bases without data leaks.

knowledge_base.question: What is digital marketing?
knowledge_base.answer: Online promotion of business through digital channels.

knowledge_base.question: Do you manage social media?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, content creation and growth strategies.

knowledge_base.question: What is conversion optimization?
knowledge_base.answer: Improving website actions like sales or leads.

knowledge_base.question: Can I track users or visitors on my website?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes. We integrate analytics tools such as Google Analytics to track traffic and user behavior.

knowledge_base.question: Can you create landing pages for ads?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we build high-converting landing pages for Facebook Ads, Google Ads, and marketing campaigns.

knowledge_base.question: Can you improve my business online presence?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we help improve online presence through websites, SEO structure, and digital optimization.

knowledge_base.question: Can you redesign my existing website?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we redesign websites with modern UI/UX, better speed, and improved user experience.

knowledge_base.question: Do you also design websites?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we provide complete UI/UX design and development services.

knowledge_base.question: What if I don't like the design?
knowledge_base.answer: We provide revisions until you are fully satisfied.

knowledge_base.question: Do you provide branding services?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we offer logo design and full brand identity solutions.

knowledge_base.question: Do you offer UI/UX design separately?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we provide UI/UX design services even if you don't need development.

knowledge_base.question: Do you provide wireframes or mockups before development?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we create wireframes and UI mockups so you can visualize the website before development.

knowledge_base.question: Can you make my website look premium and modern?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we focus on modern UI/UX design trends to create clean, professional, and premium-looking websites.

knowledge_base.question: Do you provide support after project completion?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we provide post-launch support including bug fixes, updates, and performance optimization.

knowledge_base.question: Do you offer monthly maintenance?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we offer monthly maintenance plans for updates and security.

knowledge_base.question: Do you offer website migration services?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we migrate websites between hosting or platforms safely without data loss or SEO impact.

knowledge_base.question: Can you build a website for my startup idea?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we develop complete websites and digital products for startup ideas. Share your concept and we will guide you from planning to launch.

knowledge_base.question: Can you help me plan my whole online business?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we provide complete digital consultation including website strategy, feature planning, and online business setup guidance.

knowledge_base.question: Can you connect my website with CRM systems?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we integrate CRM tools to help manage leads, customers, and sales efficiently.

knowledge_base.question: Do you build SaaS or subscription-based platforms?
knowledge_base.answer: Yes, we develop SaaS platforms with subscription models, user dashboards, and payment systems.

knowledge_base.question: What services does your agency provide?
knowledge_base.answer: We provide website development, eCommerce development, WordPress, Shopify, custom web apps, UI/UX design, API integration, AI integration, and maintenance support.

knowledge_base.question: How much do you charge for a website?
knowledge_base.answer: Pricing depends on requirements, features, and complexity. We provide custom quotes after understanding your project.

knowledge_base.question: How do I start working with you?
knowledge_base.answer: Contact us with your project details, and we will provide a proposal, timeline, and development plan.

knowledge_base.question: What type of projects can you build?
knowledge_base.answer: We have successfully delivered diverse projects including Testherapy (Healthcare Platform), Diamonds Or Jewels (Luxury eCommerce), Invoice Builder Demo (Business Tool), and an AI-powered ChatGPT Clone.
